creator: dgeo@centrale-med.fr
text:
Created attachment 188186
mail/sympa svn patch to 6.2.22

Changelog since last port version (6.2.16): https://github.com/sympa-community/sympa/blob/6.2.22/NEWS.md

poudriere and production test'ed

Needs a UPDATING notice, like:

  AFFECTS: users of mail/sympa
  AUTHOR: dgeo@centrale-marseille.fr

  Web's static dirs have moved to a single dedicated directory.
  users should review webserver's /static configuration (examples in
  share/examples/sympa).
